sections.paragraph:
(“judge”), [Dan], pr. name-

(1) of a son of Jacob, and of the tribe bearing his name; the boundaries of whose land are described, -Josh. 19:4048 . [Whence the Gentile noun דָּנִי Jud. 13:2 ].

(2) of a town on the northern limit of Palestine (otherwise called לַיִשׁ), Jos 19:47 Jud. 18:29 , which took its name from a colony of the Danites. In the words דָּנָה יַעַן 2Sa 24:6, there appears to be a transcriptural error, and we should probably read יַעַד. Vulg. silvestria.

[For וְדָן see under .]
